registry_scope: Admissible-Existence subject repositories mirrored as formalism records.
authority_boundary: This registry mirrors and classifies formalism records from Admissible-Existence subject repositories. It does not create source authority, proof authority, execution authority, continuity standing, or admissibility standing.

records.name: Commit-Time Admissibility
records.purpose: Mirror public-safe metadata for Commit-Time Admissibility and connect present standing, commitment candidates, standing reconstruction, decision outcomes, receipts, and validation fixtures to the formalism graph.
records.transition_relationship: commit-time admissibility canonical detail page installed; baseline tests and mirror handoff recorded; formal proof extraction pending
non_claims: Wiki mirroring must not expose private CTA source content.
Wiki mirroring does not define, prove, or validate CTA claims.
CTA baseline tests do not prove the complete formalism.

records.name: Irreversibility-Inference Convergence Theorem

records.transition_relationship: IICT canonical detail page installed; baseline tests and mirror handoff recorded; theorem proof and peer review pending
non_claims: Wiki mirroring must not expose private IICT source content.

IICT does not replace Commit-Time Admissibility.
